metadata.description: SQL Server plugins from Darling Data - https://erikdarling.com. Works in both Claude Code and GitHub Copilot CLI.

plugins.name: sqlserver-query-plans
plugins.description: Read a SQL Server execution plan and explain what is actually slow, and why. Prevents the standard wrong conclusions: cost percentages read as measurements, operators ranked by cumulative time, estimated rows compared to actual without dividing by executions, and missing-index DDL pasted verbatim.
